pages.text: The PUREX process involves dissolving spent fuel in Nitric Acid (HNO3) in a Solvent Extractor to create Uranyl Nitrate and Plutonium Nitrate solutions. These are then treated with Tributyl Phosphate (TBP) to separate Uranium and Plutonium from Fission Products.

The Chemical Converter is used for the conversion chain: Yellowcake + HNO3 -> Uranyl Nitrate. Uranyl Nitrate + TBP -> UO2. UO2 + HF -> UF4. UF4 + F2 -> UF6. This realistic cycle is essential for fuel fabrication and enrichment.
